name: @microsoft/mxc-sdk-linux-x64
description: MXC SDK native binaries for linux-x64 (x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu).

scripts.prepack: node -e "if(!require('fs').existsSync('lxc-exec')){console.error('prepack: lxc-exec not staged; refusing to pack an empty platform package');process.exit(1)}"

author: Microsoft Corporation
